# idsec_cce_azure_workspaces (Data Source)

CCE Azure workspaces data source, retrieves Azure workspaces with optional filtering.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `parent_id` (String) Filter by parent CCE onboarding ID
- `services` (String) Filter by services, comma-separated (for example, sia,sca)
- `workspace_status` (String) Filter by status, comma-separated (for example, Completely added,Failed to add)
- `workspace_type` (String) Filter by type (for example, azure_organization, azure_entra, azure_management_group, azure_subscription)

### Read-Only

- `workspaces` (Attributes List) List of all retrieved workspaces. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces))

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces`

Read-Only:

- `data` (Attributes) Detailed workspace information (IDs, names, services, status) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces--data))
- `key` (String) Unique CCE onboarding ID for the workspace
- `leaf` (Boolean) Indicates if workspace is leaf node (account) or can have children (organization/organization unit)
- `parent_id` (String) CCE onboarding ID of parent workspace (Organization or Organization Unit)
- `path` (String) Hierarchical path in the organizational structure

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces.data`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) Human-readable name shown in CCE UI
- `id` (String) CCE onboarding ID for the workspace
- `onboarding_type` (String) Onboarding type: standard (UI), programmatic (API), or terraform_provider
- `organization_id` (String) CCE onboarding ID of parent organization (for AWS accounts)
- `organization_name` (String) Display name of parent organization
- `platform_id` (String) Cloud provider's native identifier (e.g., AWS account ID)
- `platform_type` (String) Cloud platform (AWS)
- `services` (Attributes List) Detailed service information including version, status, and errors (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workspaces--data--services))
- `status` (String) Overall onboarding status (e.g., Completely added, Partially added, Failed to add)
- `type` (String) Workspace type (e.g., aws_organization, aws_root, aws_ou, aws_account)

<a id="nestedatt--workspaces--data--services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workspaces.data.services`

Read-Only:

- `error_details` (String) Detailed error information
- `name` (String) Service name identifier
- `resources` (Map of String) Saved service resources for recovery purposes
- `service_status` (String) Current onboarding status of the service
- `services_errors` (List of String) List of service errors
- `suspended` (Boolean) Whether the service is suspended
- `version` (String) Service version number
